data.intent: Add a gamified token economy to Carter's Arcade: earn/spend tokens via gameplay, achievements, daily leaderboards, and riddles/tasks; new Next.js backend + admin dashboard at dev.cartercripe.com/arcade; Discord bot integration via a published API contract (bot built separately by Carter).
Scaffold arcade-backend/ Next.js project: Drizzle schema, Neon Postgres, Auth.js (Google), ledger write helper, games seed

data.summary: Scaffolded arcade-backend/ Next.js App Router project
Added arcade-backend/vercel.json scoped for Root Directory deploy (ADR-1)
Wrote lib/db/schema.ts covering all tech-design Data Models tables incl. content_items/content_completions
Implemented lib/ledger.ts as the sole transactions-writer (ADR-2), incl. adminAdjustBalance()
Wrote ledger.test.ts (balance reconstruction); passes except DB connectivity, pending Neon provisioning
Configured Auth.js Google provider (code complete, live verification pending real OAuth creds)
Stubbed Discord provider in Auth.js for later account-linking
Wrote scripts/seed.ts for the games table roster/costs
Reflected confirmed npm run dev/port + resolved NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW markers in approach.md
